failedAssertions.reason: Data blocker - no bookings exist in database (0 booking records). Staff has 0 active bookings, so reassign modal cannot be tested. UI works but requires actual booking data to exercise the reassign flow.

Feature not implemented - duplicate procedure functionality does not exist in UI. The admin-tramites-redesign feature is pending in tramites-reportes-auditoria-config milestone. No 'Duplicar' button exists on procedure cards.

Data blocker - no reservation series exist in database (0 booking_series records). Cannot test series instance modifications since action buttons only appear when a series is selected.

summary: Round 8 user testing: 45/49 pass. 4 assertions remain failed due to data blockers (no bookings/series in database) or missing feature (duplicate procedure pending in future milestone). All implementation features for dashboard-citas-usuarios are complete. Blockers require either: (1) seeding booking/series data into database, or (2) implementing admin-tramites-redesign in tramites-reportes-auditoria-config milestone.
